use_codes.desc: FOR TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH PROSTATE-SPECIFIC MEMBRANE ANTIGEN (PSMA)-POSITIVE METASTATIC CASTRATION-RESISTANT PROSTATE CANCER (MCRPC) WHO HAVE BEEN TREATED WITH ANDROGEN RECEPTOR (AR) PATHWAY INHIBITION AND TAXANE-BASED CHEMOTHERAPY

indications.text:
PLUVICTO is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with prostate-specific membrane antigen (PSMA)-positive
metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) who have been treated with androgen receptor pathway inhibitor
(ARPI) therapy, and
• are considered appropriate to delay taxane-ba...

PLUVICTO is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with prostate-specific membrane antigen (PSMA)-positive
metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) who have been treated with androgen receptor (AR) pathway
inhibition and taxane-based chemotherapy.
